# @generated by pyxis — do not edit
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(test_project CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# Sanity check: pyxis.toml's pointer_size (8) must match the toolchain's pointer size.
if(NOT CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 8)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "pyxis project 'test-project' expects pointer size 8 but toolchain has ${CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P}. Use a 64-bit MSVC env.")
endif()

file(GLOB_RECURSE PYXIS_SRC CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "src/*.cpp")
file(GLOB_RECURSE PYXIS_HDR CONFIGURE_DEPENDS "include/*.hpp")

if(PYXIS_SRC)
    add_library(test_project STATIC ${PYXIS_SRC} ${PYXIS_HDR})
else()
    add_library(test_project INTERFACE)
endif()

if(TARGET test_project)
    get_target_property(_pyxis_type test_project TYPE)
    if(_pyxis_type STREQUAL "INTERFACE_LIBRARY")
        target_include_directories(test_project INTERFACE include)
    else()
        target_include_directories(test_project PUBLIC include)
        target_compile_features(test_project PUBLIC cxx_std_17)
    endif()
endif()
